name: Prismatic
description: Chromatic depth shifting. Iridescent, futuristic. Surfaces change hue as they layer deeper, creating a rainbow-depth effect. Each elevation level has a different hue tint.
personality: rounded + raised elevation + smooth motion + thin borders + vivid gradients

decorators.prismatic-card: Rounded card with iridescent border shimmer that shifts hue on hover, subtle indigo-tinted shadow at rest.
decorators.prismatic-gradient: Background gradient shifting through indigo, pink, and teal at low opacity for section backgrounds.
decorators.prismatic-chip: Small rounded chip with chromatic gradient fill that changes hue based on elevation depth level.
decorators.prismatic-glow: Soft radial glow behind hero elements using primary indigo at 15% opacity with feathered edges.

prismatic-card.description: Rounded card with iridescent border shimmer that shifts hue on hover, subtle indigo-tinted shadow at rest.
prismatic-card.intent: Use for content containers that reveal the chromatic depth effect. The iridescent border shift creates a magical, futuristic interaction.

prismatic-gradient.description: Background gradient shifting through indigo, pink, and teal at low opacity for section backgrounds.
prismatic-gradient.intent: Use as a background for page sections to create the signature chromatic shift. Each section can have a slightly different hue emphasis.

prismatic-chip.description: Small rounded chip with chromatic gradient fill that changes hue based on elevation depth level.
prismatic-chip.intent: Use for tags, labels, and small interactive elements. The chromatic fill visually encodes depth or category information.

prismatic-glow.description: Soft radial glow behind hero elements using primary indigo at 15% opacity with feathered edges.
prismatic-glow.intent: Use behind hero elements and featured content to create an ethereal, glowing backdrop that enhances the chromatic depth effect.
